metadata.description: Rules and prompts to convert low-value tasks into quantified achievements.

steps: Pick an action verb and compress

examples.achievement: Coordinated cross-team delivery cadence; reduced handoff delays 3d→1d
Implemented shared triage rules; cut response SLAs from 24h→6h
Automated weekly QA dashboard; prep time 6h→30m; enabled faster release go/no‑go
